mapper.select: SELECT PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS propertyGroupId, PROPERTY_ID AS propertyId, PROPERTY_NAME AS propertyName, PROPERTY_DESC AS propertyDesc, DATA_TYPE AS dataType, VALID_DATA AS validData, DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_PROPERTY WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} AND PROPERTY_ID = #{propertyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_PROPERTY ( PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_DESC, DATA_TYPE, VALID_DATA, DEFAULT_VALUE, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME ) VALUES ( #{dto.propertyGroupId}, #{dto.propertyId}, #{dto.propertyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.propertyDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.validData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.defaultValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{lastUpdateDtime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_PROPERTY SET PROPERTY_NAME = #{dto.propertyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROPERTY_DESC = #{dto.propertyDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_TYPE = #{dto.dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALID_DATA = #{dto.validData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEFAULT_VALUE = #{dto.defaultValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime} WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{dto.propertyGroupId} AND PROPERTY_ID = #{dto.propertyId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME AS PROPERTY_GROUP_NAME, COUNT(*) AS PROPERTY_COUNT, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_PROPERTY p INNER JOIN FWK_CODE c ON p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = c.CODE AND c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR00006'
GROUP BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID DESCASC
ORDER BY c.CODE_NAME DESCASC
ORDER BY PROPERTY_COUNT DESCASC
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID
) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID FROM FWK_PROPERTY p INNER JOIN FWK_CODE c ON p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = c.CODE AND c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR00006'
GROUP BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID )

SELECT p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME AS PROPERTY_GROUP_NAME, COUNT(*) AS PROPERTY_COUNT, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_PROPERTY p INNER JOIN FWK_CODE c ON p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = c.CODE AND c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR00006' GROUP BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID

SELECT p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME AS PROPERTY_GROUP_NAME, COUNT(*) AS PROPERTY_COUNT, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, MAX(p.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY p.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_PROPERTY p INNER JOIN FWK_CODE c ON p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = c.CODE AND c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR00006'
GROUP BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, c.CODE_NAME
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID DESCASC
ORDER BY c.CODE_NAME DESCASC
ORDER BY PROPERTY_COUNT DESCASC
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID
ORDER BY p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID

SELECT A.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, A.PROPERTY_ID, A.PROPERTY_NAME, A.PROPERTY_DESC, A.DATA_TYPE, (CASE A.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'C' THEN 'String' WHEN 'N' THEN 'Number' WHEN 'B' THEN 'Boolean' END) AS DATA_TYPE_NAME, A.VALID_DATA, A.DEFAULT_VALUE, A.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, SUBSTR(A.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, 1, 12) AS LAST_UPDATE_DTIME FROM FWK_PROPERTY A INNER JOIN FWK_CODE B ON A.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = B.CODE AND B.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR00006' WHERE 1=1
AND A.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId}
AND A.PROPERTY_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
AND A.PROPERTY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
AND (A.PROPERTY_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR A.PROPERTY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%')
ORDER BY A.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, A.PROPERTY_ID
